summary.en: Salesforce reframed CRM from installed enterprise software into browser-based SaaS, reducing implementation burden and creating subscription access for teams that could not tolerate heavy on-premise projects.
summary.zh: Salesforce 把 CRM 从本地部署企业软件重构为浏览器上的 SaaS，降低实施负担，让无法承受重型本地项目的团队也能使用。
